message:
Merge PR #2695: gt down: clean up orphan idle-monitors, rogue Dolt servers, and stale .beads/dolt dirs

Adds Phase 4b to gt down shutdown sequence: discovers and terminates
orphan idle-monitor processes, rogue Dolt servers spawned from per-rig
.beads/dolt/ directories, and safely removes stale data directories.
Fixes port conflicts on subsequent gt dolt start.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2695
Author: Random-Word

Co-authored-by: Ross Story <rostory@microsoft.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
